title: OCD chat
description: Simple plugin for local and global chat
body:
# OCD Chat
The plugin adds global and local chat mechanic, global chat is activated by default if you put the "!" symbol before the message, but you can change this in the configuration.

!!! Attention, if you used version before 1.3.0 and decided to upgrade to it or higher, don't forget to update the config.

## Сonfiguration

![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d523abd3949b7c0f2029be6d151ecb8be17c0cfb.png)

In the config you can configure various aspects of the plugin.

## Ideas
If you have any suggestions for improving this plugin, you can share them on [Discord](https://discord.gg/cC37UNPuaz).
